items.headline: Puerto Rico mourns death of basketball icon José 'Piculín' Ortiz
items.description: José “Piculín” Ortiz played parts of two seasons in the NBA, but played in four World Championships and four Olympic Games.

items.headline: Luka Dončić, Jalen Williams ruled out for Game 1 of West semifinals
items.description: Hamstring injuries will keep the Lakers' star guard and the Thunder's standout forward out of the lineup for the series opener.

items.headline: Starting 5: Wolves, Knicks get Game 1 wins; Pair of Game 1s in semis await tonight
items.description: Minnesota steals Game 1 in San Antonio, Jalen Brunson fuels another Knicks outburst and a pair of Game 1s await tonight.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Timberwolves win despite dominant defense by Wemby
items.description: The Timberwolves and Spurs face off in an epic Game 1, with Minnesota on top despite a record performance by Victor Wembanyama.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Jalen Brunson leads Knicks to heavy win over sluggish Sixers in Game 1
items.description: The Knicks open their Eastern Conference semifinal against Philly the same way they ended the first round: A blowout victory.

items.headline: Victor Wembanyama sets NBA single-game playoff blocks record
items.description: Victor Wembanyama sends back a single-game playoff record 12 blocked shots Game 1 of San Antonio's West semifinal vs. Minnesota.

items.headline: Recap: 2026 NBA Playoffs, Conference Semifinals | Knicks, Timberwolves win as Wemby sets all-time Playoff blocks record
items.description: Check out the top highlights, stats and observations from Monday's action in the Conference Semifinals of the 2026 NBA Playoffs.

items.headline: NBA Playoffs: What to expect in Pistons-Cavaliers series
items.description: Detroit and Cleveland face off the East semifinals after each winning Game 7s in the first round.

items.headline: Bulls hire Hawks executive Bryson Graham to lead their front office
items.description: Graham spent the 2025-26 season with Atlanta after 15-year run in New Orleans' front office that saw him rise from intern to GM.

items.headline: Pistons announce extension with coach J.B. Bickerstaff
items.description: The Pistons have gone 104-60 in regular-season games under Bickerstaff and made 2 playoff appearances since he joined in 2024-25.

items.headline: The Athletic: Rudy Gobert and Victor Wembanyama now stand in each other’s way
items.description: Rudy Gobert has been mentoring Victor Wembanyama since his prodigy was a high schooler. They now will battle for a chance at a title.

items.headline: What drills are held at NBA Draft Combine? Here's a closer look
items.description: Take a closer look at the drills and activities at the 2026 AWS NBA Draft Combine in Chicago from May 10-17.

items.headline: Mavs name Masai Ujiri as team president and alternate governor
items.description: The former NBA Executive of the Year will oversee roster construction, player personnel and scouting for Dallas.

items.headline: The Athletic: Where Donovan Mitchell finds his drive
items.description: Mitchell has never made it past the second round. But his self-belief can be traced back to a special relationship.

items.headline: Magic dismiss coach Jamahl Mosley after first-round exit
items.description: The Magic have dismissed coach Jamahl Mosley, who coached the team for five seasons and went 189-221 in that span.
